title: elymus donianus
intro: Elymus donianus, also known as Donian wheat grass, is a type of grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Elymus donianus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to promote overall well-being and health benefits.
